rules.rule: Orchestration services must coordinate two or more foundation or processing services to fulfil a multi-entity business requirement.
Orchestration services must expose named business-operation methods reflecting the multi-entity workflow.
Orchestration services must depend only on foundation services, processing services, or other orchestration services — never on brokers.
Cross-entity validation and business rules must be handled at the orchestration layer.
Every behavior must have a failing test written before the implementation (TDD).
All test inputs and outputs must be randomized; expected variables must use DeepClone().
